best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-utente-002 title: verify user login module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: user is registered. test data: username: testuser, password: testpass test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" as username and "testpass" as password. 2. user clicks on "login" button. 3. application sends a request to the database to verify the user's credentials. 4. database checks if the user is registered and if the password matches. 5. if the credentials are correct, the database grants access and sends a confirmation back to the application. 6. application redirects the user to the homepage. expected result: user is logged in and redirected to the homepage.

test case id: tc-materiale-001 title: add new material module: materiale source pages: 3 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: chemical formula: ch4, device id: 12345, percentage presence: 50, carbon footprint: 10 test steps: 1. user navigates to the material management page. 2. user enters "ch4" as the chemical formula, "12345" as the device id, "50" as the percentage presence, and "10" as the carbon footprint. 3. user clicks on "add material" button. 4. application sends a request to the database to add the new material. 5. database adds the new material and confirms the addition. 6. application redirects the user to the material management page. expected result: new material is added and the user is redirected to the material management page.

test case id: tc-utente-003 title: verify user login with incorrect password module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: user is registered. test data: username: testuser, password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" as username and "wrongpassword" as password. 2. user clicks on "login" button. 3. application sends a request to the database to verify the user's credentials. 4. database checks if the user is registered and if the password matches. 5. if the credentials are incorrect, the database denies access and sends a failure message back to the application. 6. application displays an error message to the user. expected result: user is shown an error message indicating incorrect password.
